subject: ENGLISH
title: Sequence words to represent meaning in simple
objective: Sequence words to represent meaning in simple sentences.
introduction: Can you read a word without sounding it out? That's what we call a SIGHT WORD! Today we explore: Sequence words to represent meaning in simple sentences.. Let's build your reading superpowers! 🦸

vocabulary.definition: A common word you recognize instantly without sounding out.
A group of words that expresses a complete thought.
